content:
✨ luna | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a unified, customizable, and self-hosted interface for aggregating and viewing multiple digital calendars.
✨ Key Features: • Calendar aggregation from CalDav, iCal, Google Calendar • Single web application frontend • User management • Infinitely customizable themes and fonts • Built-in themes and easy installation of custom themes/fonts
📖 Summary: Luna is a self-hosted calendar aggregator and frontend application that consolidates calendars from various protocols like CalDav, iCal, and Google Calendar into a single, customizable web interface. It offers extensive theming options and user management, aiming to provide a unified and personalized calendar experience.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
